description: This file defines a lightweight security principal named AppUserPrincipal using Java record, representing authenticated user details including username and role. It provides a method to retrieve authorities based on the user's role.

classes.name: AppUserPrincipal
classes.description: A Java record acting as a security principal encapsulating username and user role, with a method to generate authorities.

methods.name: authorities
methods.description: Returns a collection of granted authorities derived from the user's role.
